scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/fixtures typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/demo-runner typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/api-worker typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/pwa typecheck
scripts.test: bun test packages/shared/test packages/fixtures/test packages/demo-runner/test && bun run test:pwa && bun run test:worker
scripts.move:test: echo "TODO: run sui move test in packages/contracts"
scripts.verify:fast: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build:pwa && bun run build:api
